dailyNews.title: Iran’s power grid explained as Trump escalates threat to energy infrastructure
dailyNews.description: President Trump threatens military action against Iran's power plants unless the Strait of Hormuz reopens. Iran's power grid, heavily reliant on thermal generation, may be resilient but could face retaliation if attacked.

dailyNews.title: Why a judge eviscerating the Pentagon rules for censoring and punishing journalists is a victory for the press
dailyNews.description: A federal judge overturned Pentagon press restrictions that evicted major news outlets, ruling the policy violated First Amendment press freedom rights.

dailyNews.title: Air Canada jet hits fire truck, killing 2 and forcing New York's LaGuardia airport to close
dailyNews.description: An Air Canada Express regional jet crashed into a Port Authority vehicle after landing at New York's LaGuardia Airport, killing two people and forcing the airport to close.

topStories.title: Iran unswayed by Trump's 48-hour deadline and threats to 'obliterate' energy infrastructure
topStories.description: Iran has threatened to escalate strikes on energy infrastructure should President Donald Trump make good on a promise to “obliterate” the country’s power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz. NBC News’ Matt Bradley reports from Tel Aviv, Israel.

topStories.title: Trump admin. to send ICE agents to assist TSA at airports
topStories.description: The Trump administration says ICE agents will deploy to airports across the country on Monday to assist TSA officers with security at airport entrances and exits where lines have been particularly long in recent weeks. NBC News’ Julie Tsirkin reports.

dailyNews.title: Tom Homan says ICE agents will assist at airport security points amid TSA staffing shortages
dailyNews.description: The White House border czar said agents will deploy to airports across the country Monday to assist TSA officers with security at airport entrances and exits where lines have been particularly long in recent weeks.

dailyNews.title: Iran says Strait of Hormuz will be "completely closed" if Trump delivers on threats
dailyNews.description: The president threatened to "obliterate" Iranian power plants if Iran didn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz by late Monday night Eastern Daylight Time.

dailyNews.title: Poll: Most say Iran war not going well, but don't want regime left in power
dailyNews.description: Most Republicans, especially MAGA, continue to support the US action and express a lot of confidence in Trump personally.

dailyNews.title: Trump calling in ICE agents for airport security as DHS shutdown continues
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration says ICE officers will be stationed at hotspot U.S. airports starting Monday to assist with TSA screenings. They will undergo some training before then. Skyler Henry reports.

dailyNews.title: Collapse of U.S. shipbuilding poses national and economic security risks | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: China rolls out over 1,000 cargo ships a year, while the U.S. – maybe three. The Trump administration has called this a crisis with both economic and national security risks.

dailyNews.title: The American rare earths company seeking to topple China's dominance | 60 Minutes
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is working with a U.S. company to challenge China's dominance over rare earth elements. The metals are essential for components in smartphones, robotics, fighter jets, and drones.

dailyNews.title: Israel Thought It Could Spur Rebellion Inside Iran. That Hasn’t Happened.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s hopes that an Israeli plan to ignite an internal uprising against Iran’s theocratic government could bring the war to a swift end have so far been dashed.

dailyNews.title: Iranians Fear Trump’s Threat to Strike Power Plants
dailyNews.description: With President Trump threatening to strike Iranian power plants, some war-weary civilians are panicking over a possible new debacle.

dailyNews.title: ICE to Help TSA at Airports Amid Partial Shutdown, Trump’s Border Czar Says
dailyNews.description: Tom Homan, President Trump’s chief border official, cast the operation largely as one to help ease long security lines. The Homeland Security Department said 14 airports across the country would be involved.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Is the ‘Least Racist’ President. But His Term Echoes a Grim Past.
dailyNews.description: Woodrow Wilson’s presidency has taken on new resonance among historians and critics of President Trump, particularly when it comes to race.

dailyNews.title: In Denmark’s Election, How Will the Woman Who Took On Trump Fare?
dailyNews.description: Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen is the biggest force this country has seen in decades. The crisis in Greenland has energized her, but are voters itching for change?
